info.title: About app
info.paragraphOne: This application was created for the convenient graphical display of a learning stage plan. I wanted to implement the ability to build several major learning branches within a single topic, each of which can contain different stages and substages. Also, the ability to view your plan as a dependency tree — for a visual understanding of the direction of movement in learning.
info.paragraphTwo: I wanted to create an application without reliance on network file storage. Therefore, data is stored locally, and using the application on different devices requires export/import. This decision was made for personal reasons. However, anyone can always add their own implementation of a network database.

tutorial.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support video

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.message: Welcome to Entity Graph! This quick guide will help you get started and work efficiently with the application.

homePage.title: Home Page
homePage.message: Here you'll find all your entities. You can create new ones, as well as export or import data from files — all management in one place.

createEntity.title: Creating an Entity
createEntity.message: Click the 'New Entity' button on the home page to add an entity. Just give it a name — and you're ready to start.

entityPage.title: Entity Page
entityPage.message: This is your main workspace. Here you can create branches, items, and sub-items, edit them, change statuses, and track your progress — everything you need to manage your project.

createBranch.title: Creating a Branch
createBranch.message: To start structuring information, click the 'New Branch' button on the entity page.

branch.title: Working with a Branch
branch.message: Inside a branch, you can create, view, and edit items and sub-items. On the right, you'll see a graphical diagram of items and their statuses. Hover over an item — and you'll see its sub-items and their status.

progress.title: Tasks & Progress
progress.message: On the left side of the entity page, you can always see your upcoming tasks and overall progress across branches. This makes planning easier and helps you stay on top of everything.

start.title: The Future of the App
start.message: Entity Graph will keep getting better with every update. All new versions and features are always available on the project page. Wishing you inspiration, exciting challenges, and great results!
